questionHtml:
The magnetic field strength of Earth’s field at the location of the wires is 45 μT.

Discuss the assumption made in this question.
markschemeHtml:
Use of F=BIl ✓

45×10-6×10×0.25=1.15×10-4 N ✓

Concludes that the assumption is not valid ✓

meta.title: The magnetic field strength of Earth’s field at the location of the wires is 45 μT. Discuss the assumption made in this question.
